entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: A country in Africa facing significant climate-related vulnerabilities and variability effects.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in global or regional climate patterns that impact agricultural productivity.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Short-term fluctuations in climate conditions that create risks for farming systems.

entities.name: CLIMATE SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address food security and climate change.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers operating small-scale agricultural plots who are vulnerable to climate risks.

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION
entities.description: Data and knowledge regarding climate patterns used to inform agricultural decisions.

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Geographic areas defined by similar climate, soil, and landform characteristics.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL MARKETS
entities.description: Systems for the trade of agricultural inputs and produce.

entities.name: RISK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of identifying and mitigating threats to agricultural production.

entities.name: ADAPTATION DECISIONS
entities.description: Choices made by farmers to adjust practices in response to climate change.

entities.name: AICCRA
entities.description: An initiative that leverages networks to communicate climate information and smart agriculture practices.
